name: CRE Workflows
description: Chainlink Runtime Environment workflows for trigger monitoring, eligibility KYC, settlement, and fiat payment processing

dbTables.name: trigger-monitoring
dbTables.description: Cron-triggered workflow that fetches data from configured sources (CoinGecko, Chainlink price feeds, weather APIs), applies consensus (median/majority/byFields) inside TEE enclave, compares against pool threshold, and calls CRERouter.report() on-chain if trigger condition is met.

columns.name: inputs
columns.type: pool address, sources config, threshold, comparison, cadence

columns.name: teeAttested
columns.type: boolean — true, runs in Confidential HTTP

dbTables.name: eligibility-kyc
dbTables.description: HTTP-triggered workflow that verifies user eligibility inside CRE TEE enclave. Validates documents, checks regulatory compliance (sanctions, KYC level), and writes proof hash to EligibilityRegistry on-chain. Called by /api/eligibility as a server wallet alternative.

columns.name: trigger
columns.type: HTTP (called by /api/eligibility or direct CRE trigger)

columns.name: capabilities
columns.type: HTTP Client (TEE / Confidential HTTP), EVM Write

columns.name: teeAttested
columns.type: boolean — true, PII processed in enclave only

dbTables.name: settlement
dbTables.description: Triggered when trigger-monitoring confirms the trigger condition has fired. Calculates pro-rata payout amounts per policy, calls InsurancePool.onReport(SETTLEMENT, amount) to distribute CZUSD to all active policyholders. Pool state transitions ACTIVE → SETTLED.

columns.name: trigger
columns.type: Triggered by trigger-monitoring workflow result or manual CRE call

columns.name: outputs
columns.type: InsurancePool.onReport(1, settlementAmount) — distributes CZUSD, updates PolicyNFT statuses

dbTables.name: payment-fiat
dbTables.description: HTTP-triggered by Stripe webhook forwarded from /api/stripe-webhook. Verifies payment completion off-chain inside TEE, then calls CZUSDConsumer.mint() to issue CZUSD tokens to the user's wallet. Decouples fiat payment from on-chain mint.

columns.name: outputs
columns.type: CZUSDConsumer.mint(userAddress, amount) — mints CZUSD to wallet

columns.name: teeAttested
columns.type: boolean — true, Stripe verification in enclave
